name: sinatra-basic
given: A Sinatra 4 application with Puma, no existing monitoring
prompt: Set up Sentry for this Sinatra application. Add error monitoring, tracing, and logging. Use the SENTRY_DSN environment variable.

soft_assertions.criterion: The agent detected Sinatra (not Rails) and used sentry-ruby without sentry-rails
The agent added Sentry::Rack::CaptureExceptions middleware for request tracing

negative_assertions.criterion: The agent should not create a Rails-style initializer in config/initializers/
